text: Welcome helper_alex! Your application has been approved as a moderator. Please review the moderator guidelines and join the #moderators channel to get started.
Welcome guide_sam! Your application has been approved as an event helper. Check out the #events channel for upcoming activities and the event planning guide.
Welcome newbie_kim! Your application has been approved as a member. Please introduce yourself in #introductions and check out the #getting-started channel for community resources.
Welcome mentor_lina! Your application has been approved as a mentor. Join the #mentors channel to connect with other mentors and review the mentorship program guidelines.
